about.title: About Valcot

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Valcot Partners was founded on the belief that businesses of all sizes deserve professional-grade HR services. Starting from payroll services for SMEs, we have grown to become one of Thailand's most trusted comprehensive HR partners.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To help businesses grow sustainably by managing their HR back-office and compliance operations comprehensively, so clients can focus entirely on management and business expansion.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: Operating with transparency, honesty, and strict client confidentiality.

items.title: Excellence
items.description: Committed to delivering the highest quality results through systematic processes.

items.title: Client-Centric
items.description: Designing services tailored to each client's specific needs.

items.title: Compliance
items.description: Strictly adhering to all relevant laws and regulations.

about.description: Valcot is a business operations support provider focused on HR administration, payroll support, recruitment operations, and compliance documentation. We help clients reduce operational friction and improve accuracy by implementing structured workflows with clear responsibilities and consistent delivery.
about.painpoints: Common pain points we address include scattered employee records, time-consuming attendance/OT consolidation, inconsistent data submission, and repeated payroll revisions due to missing information.
about.suitable: Best suited for SMEs, factories, and multi-site operators that need reliable operational support without immediately increasing internal headcount.

items.question: What does Valcot do—and what is out of scope?
items.answer: We focus on HR administration, payroll operational support, recruitment operations, and compliance documentation based on an agreed scope. We do not position ourselves as "doing everything" without proper assessment and scope definition.

items.question: How is pricing structured?
items.answer: Pricing depends on headcount, multi-site complexity, attendance/OT structure, and service scope. We assess your requirements before proposing a suitable package.

items.question: What information do we need from the client?
items.answer: Employee data, site structure and payroll cycle, working time/OT policies, and required HR documents within the agreed scope to ensure accuracy and reduce rework.

items.question: Is Accounting & Tax Support a full accounting service?
items.answer: Accounting and tax-related support is scope-based and typically focuses on documentation support and coordination. Delivery may involve collaboration with certified professionals or partner teams where appropriate.

items.question: What happens if client documents/data are incomplete?
items.answer: We follow checklists and timelines. If required inputs are missing, we clearly communicate what is missing and how it impacts timelines so the client can respond accordingly.

items.question: How does Valcot handle confidentiality and employee data?
items.answer: We follow confidentiality principles, maintain structured document storage, and restrict access based on roles and responsibilities to protect sensitive information.

contact.title: Sustainable business growth starts with effective systems
contact.subtitle: At Valcot Partners, we believe stable growth needs strong support systems across people, payroll, legal, accounting, technology, and back-office operations. We help reduce workload, improve accuracy, and move your business forward with confidence. Start with a free 30-minute consultation and we will help identify which services fit your situation at no cost.

aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to make us your HR partner?
storyParagraphs: Valcot Partners is more than a back-office provider. We act as a strategic partner helping organizations build reliable business support systems from the ground up. We understand that growth depends on how people, legal, accounting, tax, technology, and operations work together.

Our team supports HR, payroll, recruitment, legal and compliance, accounting and tax, event operations, and travel coordination, giving your organization one clear point of coordination while reducing manual work and improving audit readiness.
Every service is shaped around the client’s actual context, including company size, team structure, industry, site complexity, and growth goals.
aboutPage.visionText: To be a trusted Business Support Solutions partner that connects expertise in people, legal, finance, technology, and operations so businesses can operate with stability, agility, and long-term readiness for growth.

aboutPreview.heading: A partner that understands your business
body: Valcot Partners is more than a back-office provider. We act as a strategic partner helping organizations build reliable business support systems from the ground up. We understand that growth depends on how people, legal, accounting, tax, technology, and operations work together.

Our team supports HR, payroll, recruitment, legal and compliance, accounting and tax, event operations, and travel coordination, giving your organization one clear point of coordination while reducing manual work and improving audit readiness.
Every service is shaped around the client’s actual context, including company size, team structure, industry, site complexity, and growth goals.
aboutPreview.visionText: To be a trusted Business Support Solutions partner that connects expertise in people, legal, finance, technology, and operations so businesses can operate with stability, agility, and long-term readiness for growth.
aboutPreview.missionText: To reduce back-office complexity, improve management efficiency, raise operating standards, and deliver legally compliant, transparent, and auditable services through experts who understand each client’s context and design solutions around real needs.
